# CLAUDE.md

## Overview

The `tests/fixtures/analysis` directory documents the block, limit, and custom-plan scenarios covered by parity tests.

## Index

| File | Contents (WHAT) | Read When (WHEN) |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `CLAUDE.md` | Analysis-fixture directory index and task map | Locating analysis fixture guidance quickly |
| `README.md` | Analysis fixture scenarios and sanitization notes | Extending block or limit parity coverage |
